title: MikroTik LHGGM&EG18-EA, LHG LTE18 kit
description: LHG LTE18 kit is a device used to connect to a mobile 3G/LTE network. Place it outside on a pole or anywhere high enough and connect where there are no cell phones . Thanks to the large, high-gain antenna, the device can connect to transmitters even in extreme rural locations, which will allow you to provide Internet access even in places where nothing else is available The unit is equipped with one Gigabit LAN port, has a built-in high-quality Category 18 modem for speeds up to 1200 Mbps download and 150 Mbps upload Device Mast Mount Kit 24V/0.8A power adapter Gigabit PoE injector (2) metal cable tie
